reviews.comment:
Fuimos revisaron nivel de aceite. Faltaba un litro ( supuestamente) Hacia tres semanas le habiamos cambiado aceite y filtro. En un momento el playero ya esta cargardo de aceite de un envase que jamas no lo mostro cerrado. Bajamos inmediantamente a ver que le ponia y justo en menos de 5 segundos ya habia vaciado un litro de aceite. Sin nada en el fondo del envase...Muy raro!!!

(Translated by Google)
We went to check the oil level. It was supposedly a liter low. We had changed the oil and filter three weeks prior. Suddenly, the attendant was carrying a container full of oil, which he never showed us was sealed. We immediately got out to see what he was putting in, and in less than five seconds, he had already poured in a liter of oil. There was nothing left in the container... Very strange!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZdmJIMDNBRRAB
